evals.prompt: Run /skill-craft on P:/.claude/skills/skill-craft — the skill-craft skill should diagnose, plan, execute, evaluate fidelity, and gate itself. Expected: exit_condition=True with 'Fidelity and cert gate both passed'.
evals.expected_output: CraftState with exit_condition=True, phase=DONE, cert_gate.passed=True, fidelity_score.passed=True

evals.prompt: Run /skill-craft on a non-existent path P:/tmp/nonexistent-skill-xyz — should handle gracefully without crashing, return a CraftState with appropriate error in execution_results.
evals.expected_output: CraftState returned without unhandled exception, execution_results contains error info

evals.prompt: Run /skill-craft on P:/.claude/skills/gto — a different skill. Expected: lifecycle completes, cert_gate validates gto's SKILL.md, findings are routed correctly.
evals.expected_output: CraftState with loop_count >= 1, all_findings populated, cert_gate result present
